く……オレはもうダメだ。ヤツにとりつかれちまった……<br>兄ちゃん……オレがい:
Guh... I'm done for. That thing's possessed me... Big bro... if I'm gone,
take care of Magnolia... Oh!
おにいさん、すごい！<br>イモムシを簡単にとっちゃった！: Big brother... amazing! You plucked that caterpillar right off!
助かったぜ……さすがのオレも、葉っぱを食っちまうヤツだけは天敵でね。<br>とに:
Phew, you saved me! Even a tough guy like me can't handle
leaf-eaters—they're my natural enemy. Anyway, big bro, you saved my life!
おにいさん、恩人！<br>えっとね……すっごくかっこよかった、よ？: Big brother... our savior! Um... you were really cool, y'know?
